name: Customer name
description: Name of the customer, client, company, or organization

name: Sample ID
description: Unique sample, specimen, or test piece identifier

name: Part number
description: Customer part number, article number, component number, or Teilnummer

name: Specimen thickness
description: Thickness of the specimen, often named thickness, Dicke, thickness_mm, or t

name: Specimen width
description: Width of the specimen, often named width, Breite, width_mm, or b

name: Job no.
description: Job number for documentation in the report

name: Test standard
description: Basic test standard or norm applied to the test

name: Type and designation
description: Type and designation of the tested products or material

name: Specimen removal
description: Specimen removal location or extraction details

name: Pre-treatment
description: Pre-treatment or conditioning applied to the specimen

name: Tester
description: Name of the tester for the report

name: Notes
description: General notes or deviations from the standard test conditions

name: Machine data
description: Output of machine data in the report
